metadata.name: Generate Invoice for a Shipped Order

description: An order has been shipped to a customer. An agent in the finance department needs to generate and send the invoice.

nodes.task_description: Identify a sales order that has been marked as 'shipped'.

expected_outcome.value: Agent retrieves a recently shipped order.

nodes.task_description: Generate an invoice for the order, including item costs, taxes, and shipping fees.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully creates an accurate invoice.

nodes.task_description: Send the invoice to the customer's billing contact.

expected_outcome.value: Agent emails the invoice to the customer.
